build_system: go build with CGO_ENABLED=0; GoReleaser for releases; CircleCI for CI
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'go test ./...' - all tests pass. 2. Run 'golangci-lint run --fix ./...' - zero issues. 3. Run 'CGO_ENABLED=0 go build' - builds cleanly.
setup_instructions: Go 1.24+ and golangci-lint are pre-installed in the sandbox. Run 'go mod download' to fetch dependencies.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Go 1.25.1 default in sandbox (compatible with go 1.24 module). golangci-lint 2.1.6 available.
contribution_requirements: Conventional Commits (feat:, fix:, test:, docs:, refactor:, chore:). Use golangci-lint run --fix ./... for linting AND formatting (gofumpt). TDD approach: write tests first, then implement. Persist test specs in git.
key_patterns: Package-internal tests (same package, _test.go files alongside code). Table-driven tests with t.Run. testify/require for fatal checks, testify/assert for collection. Config package uses reader functions that return (map[string]interface{}, error). Mappers implement ToInternal(data map[string]interface{}) error. EncodeToMap uses JSON marshal/unmarshal round-trip. toYAMLKeys recursively converts camelCase map keys to snake_case.
directory_structure: main.go at root; internal/ contains all packages; internal/config/ is the primary target (coerce.go, rename.go, read.go, read_cc.go, write.go, config.go); docs/ has PRD.md, technical.md, architecture.mermaid
